=E2=80=8A

Mouth, Teeth & Breath

=E2=80=8A

Tips for a healthy mouth, strong teeth, and fresh breath

Your mouth is more than just a smile =E2=80=93 it=E2=80=99s the starting po=
int for digestion, a social tool, and an important part of your overall hea=
lth. A healthy oral microbiome and balanced bacteria help keep teeth, gums,=
 and breath in top condition every day.

=E2=80=8A

=E2=80=8A

Did you know that bad breath is often caused by anaerobic bacteria that pro=
duce sulfur compounds in the mouth?

[Discover our supplements for oral health =E2=86=92](https://www.greatlife.=
eu/health-goal/oral-health)

=E2=80=8A

[Greatlife](https://www.greatlife.eu/health-goal/oral-health)

=E2=80=8A

Create Balance in Your Oral Microbiome

=E2=80=8A

4 simple ways to care for your oral health

=E2=80=8A

1. Take care of bacterial balance in your mouth
A healthy oral microbiome is the foundation for healthy gums and fresh brea=
th. Probiotic supplements such as [Flora Plus+ Probiotics](https://www.grea=
tlife.eu/flora-plus-probiotic) and [Bacillus Coagulans LactoSpore=C2=AE](ht=
tps://www.greatlife.eu/bacillus-coagulans-greatlife) can help promote a goo=
d balance of microorganisms in the mouth and gut =E2=80=93 which in turn co=
ntributes to a healthier oral microbiome.

[Probiotics for mouth & gut =E2=86=92](https://www.greatlife.eu/supplements=
/probiotics-enzymes)

2. Make sure you get the right minerals
Calcium is a key nutrient for maintaining normal and strong teeth. Suppleme=
nts like [Calcium Citrate](https://www.greatlife.eu/calcium-citrate-greatli=
fe) combined with [vitamin D](https://www.greatlife.eu/vitamin-d3-2000-grea=
tlife) can support mineralization and tooth structure.

[Supplements for strong teeth =E2=86=92](https://www.greatlife.eu/health-go=
al/oral-health)

3. Vitamin C for your gums
[Vitamin C](https://www.greatlife.eu/vitamin-c-greatlife) contributes to no=
rmal collagen formation, which is important for healthy gums. It strengthen=
s the tissue around the teeth and can thereby improve oral function.

[Buy Vitamin C =E2=86=92](https://www.greatlife.eu/vitamin-c-greatlife)

4. Brush and clean consistently
A basic habit for everyone is to brush your teeth morning and night, and us=
e dental floss and a tongue scraper. This reduces plaque and bacteria that =
can cause cavities and bad breath.

[Buy Bamboo Toothbrush =E2=86=92](https://www.greatlife.eu/bamboo-toothbrus=
h)

 used as a substitute for a varied diet. It is essential to maintain a dive=
rse and balanced diet along with a healthy lifestyle.
